input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.6.1.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.6.1.3
            TITLE: pressure regulation - the pressure regulator must be mounted directly onto the gas

            CONTENT:
            rule T.6.1.3: Pressure Regulation - The pressure regulator must be mounted directly onto the gas
T.6.1.3 Pressure Regulation - The pressure regulator must be mounted directly onto the gas 
cylinder/tank

final_answer: Pressure Regulation - The pressure regulator must be mounted directly onto the gas cylinder/tank
